name: Nederman Holding AB
description: Nederman Holding AB is a global leader in environmental technology, dedicated to protecting people, the planet, and production from the harmful effects of industrial processes. For over 80 years, the company has pioneered clean air solutions, providing innovative and cost-effective industrial air filtration systems. By integrating digitalisation and service-based business models, Nederman helps customers achieve more efficient production, reduced environmental impact, and safer workplaces. Headquartered in Helsingborg, Sweden, the company maintains a strong international presence, delivering sustainable value to its customers, employees, and shareholders through its commitment to high-tech, green industrial practices.
